segments.text: This Zelda is playing pretty solid, huh?
segments.original_text: なかなかこうゼルダね

segments.text: Though there are moments where panic kicks in and they try to force it.
segments.original_text: 焦って追い返そうとしちゃうところもあるんですが

full_text: This Zelda is playing pretty solid, huh? Though there are moments where panic kicks in and they try to force it.
